banking-database.overview:
Production banking schema with accounts, transactions, customers, and optimized queries.

Features to build:
• ER Design & Normalization
• Schema with Foreign Keys
• Transaction Management
• Performance Indexes
• Flyway Migration Scripts

Requirements:
• Normalized schema (3NF)
• Stored procedures for transfers
• Indexes on frequently queried columns
• Flyway migrations

Bonus:
• Audit trail table with triggers
banking-database.explanation: Banking Database System is a expert-level project (Week 11). Use the verified GitHub repository for real source code and the YouTube tutorial to learn step by step. Build: ER Design & Normalization, Schema with Foreign Keys, Transaction Management, Performance Indexes, Flyway Migration Scripts.
banking-database.studyNote:
1. Watch the YouTube tutorial first.
2. Open the GitHub repo — clone or browse the source.
3. Build your version feature-by-feature in IntelliJ.
4. Test each feature before moving on.
5. Mark complete when your project works end-to-end.

ecommerce-database.overview:
E-commerce database with products, orders, customers, and advanced SQL queries.

Features to build:
• Product & Order Schema
• Complex Join Queries
• Sales Report Views
• Spring Data JPA Integration
• Paginated Product Search

Requirements:
• One-to-many and many-to-many relationships
• JPQL queries with joins
• Pagination and sorting
• Composite indexes

Bonus:
• Materialized view for sales dashboard
ecommerce-database.explanation: E-Commerce Database is a expert-level project (Week 11). Use the verified GitHub repository for real source code and the YouTube tutorial to learn step by step. Build: Product & Order Schema, Complex Join Queries, Sales Report Views, Spring Data JPA Integration, Paginated Product Search.

hospital-database.overview:
Hospital database with patients, doctors, appointments, and Hibernate entity mappings.

Features to build:
• Hospital ER Model
• Hibernate Entity Mappings
• Lazy/Eager Loading Strategy
• DTO Projections
• JPA Auditing

Requirements:
• Entity relationships with cascade
• Fetch join for appointment queries
• DTO projections to avoid N+1
• Created/Updated timestamps

Bonus:
• Soft delete for patient records
hospital-database.explanation: Hospital Database is a expert-level project (Week 11). Use the verified GitHub repository for real source code and the YouTube tutorial to learn step by step. Build: Hospital ER Model, Hibernate Entity Mappings, Lazy/Eager Loading Strategy, DTO Projections, JPA Auditing.

crm-database.overview:
CRM database with contacts, leads, activities, and dynamic query specifications.

Features to build:
• CRM Schema Design
• Dynamic Filter Specifications
• Lead Analytics Queries
• Activity Log in MongoDB
• Liquibase Migrations

Requirements:
• Relational schema for contacts/leads
• Specification API for dynamic filters
• MongoDB for activity logs
• Liquibase migration scripts

Bonus:
• Cross-database reporting query
crm-database.explanation: CRM Database is a expert-level project (Week 11). Use the verified GitHub repository for real source code and the YouTube tutorial to learn step by step. Build: CRM Schema Design, Dynamic Filter Specifications, Lead Analytics Queries, Activity Log in MongoDB, Liquibase Migrations.

inventory-database.overview:
Inventory database with batch operations, connection pooling, and performance monitoring.

Features to build:
• Inventory Schema
• Batch Insert/Update
• HikariCP Configuration
• Query Optimization
• Performance Monitoring

Requirements:
• Batch operations for stock updates
• HikariCP pool tuning
• Explain plan analysis
• Backup and restore scripts

Bonus:
• Low stock alert stored procedure
